## Summary

One-paragraph overview of what this feature does and why it matters.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Include user pain points, business requirements, or technical debt that drives this work.

## Detailed Design

### Overview

High-level description of the approach.

### Backend Changes

Describe API changes, new endpoints, data model modifications, etc.

### Frontend Changes

Describe UI changes, new components, layout modifications, etc.

### Data Flow

How data moves through the system with this feature.

```
[Diagram or flow description]
```
